creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The part spanning several files got applied after two pings and an 
iteration; the actual change that hunges on that has not yet made it 
into the yesterday's release of Wine, but since the direction of the 
upstream solution looks good, I added that patch locally now. 

Enjoy, and thanks for reporting this and inspiring the (more generic) 
solution! 

Gerald
